pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.subtitle: No hidden fees · Cancel anytime
pricing.subtitle_new: GDPR-compliant · Start for free · No credit card required
pricing.gdpr_note: GDPR-compliant · For business · Local processing · No data sent to our servers
pricing.page_subtitle_v2: Try it out or let's talk about your team.
pricing.free_tagline_v2: For trying out and occasional use
pricing.biz_tagline_v2: For teams and organizations — by agreement
biz_features_v3: Audit log for GDPR audits (CSV export)
Single invoice for the whole organization
pricing.faq1_a: Nowhere on our servers. Anonymization happens 100% in your browser. We see neither the content nor the decryption keys.
pricing.faq2_q: What do I get in Business?
pricing.faq2_a: Unlimited documents, cloud and shared vaults for teams, audit log, admin panel, DPA with SCC appendix, onboarding call. Conditions — number of users and price — agreed during the demo call.
pricing.faq3_a: Yes, in Business. A template with SCC appendix (Standard Contractual Clauses per EU decision 2021/914) is provided during onboarding and signed electronically.
pricing.faq4_q: What happens to my data when I cancel?
pricing.faq4_a: Your account is deactivated, all metadata (email, history entries) is permanently deleted within 30 days. Document contents were never on our servers.
pricing.faq5_a: Yes. Since anonymization runs in the browser and content never reaches our servers, AnonDoc is structurally GDPR-compliant. In Business, we provide DPA, audit log, and all tools for your own DPIA.
pricing.faq6_q: Can I switch from Free to Business?
pricing.faq6_a: Yes, anytime via a demo call. We discuss your requirements, agree on conditions, and fully preserve your existing data and history.
